title: Weekly Vessel Valuations Report, November 12 2024
summary:
Main
in Weekly Vessel Valuations Report 12/11/2024
Image reference: 2024-11-12_weekly-vessel-valuations-report-november-12-2024_img1.png
Bulkers: Bulker values remain stable this week, with a small decline observed for mid age Capesizes
Capesize BC Cape Laurel (180,300 DWT, Mar 2010, Imabari) sold to unknown Chinese buyers for USD 28 mil, VV Value USD 28.99 mil
Kamsarmax BC Energy Sunrise (81,800 DWT, Jun 2014, Tadotsu Imabari) sold to unknown Greek buyers for USD 23.5 mil, VV Value USD 24.24 mil
Supramax Secaon Fuzhou (63300 DWT, May 2019, Nantong Xiangyu) sold SS/DD passed to JIC Leasing for USD 31.83 mil, VV Value USD 29.36 mil
Handy BC Yangtze Grace (32,500 DWT, Jun 2012, Jiangmen Nanyang) sold to undisclosed buyers for 13.5 mil, VV Value USD 13.41 mil
Tankers: Tanker values remaining mostly stable last week with midage LR1s seeing an increase owing to the recent sale of Fulham Road
LR1 Fulham Road (75,000 DWT, Nov 2013, STX Offshore) sold to Unknown Greek buyers for USD 44.5 mil, VV Value USD 40.3 mil
Containers: Container Values remain stable this week, apart from some big increases for older Post Panamaxes due to recent sales
Post Panamax Ever United (5,364 TEU, 1996, Mitsub
